data.title: Daily update content design (format, schema, examples)

data.body: Define content model for daily updates: what gets added, entry structure, MDX frontmatter schema, tone/voice, sparse vs rich day handling, homepage preview format. Deliverable: content format spec + example entries (sparse, moderate, rich day). Gate: Julianna reviews before skill or homepage preview are built. Key refs: PRD §7, brand-guide §6.
